lane.title: 06 Meta Ads
lane.last_task: Plan Meta to WABA voucher retargeting funnel and package creatives
lane.last_summary: Verified current deployed WABA voucher flow from GitHub main whatsapp.js SHA 166b38102d7d42f86baa517211c1f2169a687146: trigger phrase 'Hi Hamza, send my WhatsApp voucher' maps to source meta_rt_voucher, creates/reuses wa_voucher_claims code HE-xxxxx, then routes to Full Menu, Voucher Offers, Open Maps, Combos, Shawarma/Kathi, or Dine-in. Created funnel spec at _context/Meta_WABA_Voucher_Retargeting_2026-05-25/FUNNEL_SPEC.md and Desktop creative pack Hamza_Meta_WABA_Voucher_Final_2026-05-25 with final A voucher-first and B food-first 9:16/4:5 PNGs plus contact sheet. No Meta or WABA send mutation.
lane.next_action: Before launch, live-test owner/test-number WABA trigger phrase, verify voucher claim row creation/readout, then create Meta messages campaign HE_RT_WABA_VOUCHER_CLAIM_20260525 using WhatsApp destination and exact prefill text; do not route this campaign to /directions.
lane.mutation_status: creative/planning output only; money mutation still blocked until direct Meta campaign creation approval and live WABA test passes
